message:
test(conformance): add wide_string, vmem, resolver, allocator harnesses

Add conformance test harnesses for four fixture families:
- wide_string_ops: wcslen, wcscpy, wcscmp, wcschr, wcsstr, etc. (12 tests)
- virtual_memory_ops: mmap, munmap, mprotect, madvise (12 tests)
- resolver: resolv.conf, DNS header, hosts lookup, getaddrinfo (13 tests)
- allocator: malloc, calloc, free, realloc (11 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
